requested_items: We need a custom CRM dashboard to manage our sales leads and customer pipeline. The system should track lead stages, log customer interactions, automate follow-up emails, and generate sales performance reports. We also need role-based access for our sales team and managers with a mobile-friendly interface.

We are managing 12 active construction sites and need a project management tool where site supervisors can upload daily photos, log progress against milestones, assign tasks to workers, and generate weekly reports for the head office. The system should have a timeline view, document storage, and a mobile app for on-site use. We also need cloud hosting and database setup.

We need a patient appointment booking system for our network of clinics. Patients should be able to book consultations online, receive SMS and email reminders, and access their medical history through a secure portal. Doctors need a dashboard to view their daily schedule, add prescriptions, and upload lab reports. We require strict data security and compliance.

We want to build an online learning platform where instructors can upload video courses, create quizzes, and track student progress. Students should be able to enrol, watch lessons, submit assignments, and receive certificates on completion. We need an admin dashboard for managing users, courses, and payments. The platform should support at least 500 concurrent users.

We need a complete inventory management system with barcode scanning for our 8 retail stores. The system should track stock levels in real time, send low stock alerts, manage supplier orders, and generate daily sales reports. We also want an e-commerce website integrated with the inventory so online and in-store stock are always in sync. SEO and digital marketing support is also required.
